title: Cuneiform Tablet #0733: Hellenistic Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
